name: Salmon Steak with Cloud Ears and Noodles
recipeIngredient: 2 Sprigs Chinese parsley (or Slivered green onion)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak cloud ears and bean thread noodles separately in warm water for 30 minutes, or until soft.
2. Wash and dice pressed beancurd into 1/4 inches cubes.
3. Heat peanut oil in a medium hot wok; add ginger and garlic. Remove when the oil becomes fragrant. Be careful not to burn the garlic; if you do, start over.
4. Lightly sauté one salmon steak at a time in aromatic oil until the surface is firm.
5. In a clay pot, combine chicken stock, cloud ears, sherry, salt and pepper. Bring to boil. Add bean thread noodles; return to boil.
6. Reduce liquid to a gentle simmer. Add salmon steaks carefully so they remain whole. Add diced bean curd. Cover and simmer for 5-7 minutes until steaks are cooked.
7. Uncover, swirl in red vinegar and sesame oil. Garnish with parsley.
